BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Quick back-of-napkin after the building manager hinted the studio lease might bump at renewal. Pre year-end review with Nina.

CurrentState.Note: Rough estimate only. Revisit with Nina once 2025 actuals are closed.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Rent increases to $1,750/mo at lease renewal
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed costs $3,030 + $100 increase = $3,130. At $110/member, $3,130 / $110 = 28.5 -> 29 members minimum (before drop-ins and print sales).
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Minimal. Well within buffer at 30 members.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Worst case - rent to $1,850/mo at renewal (unlikely)
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Still fine. Building manager said this was unlikely but wanted to stress test.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is ~28-30 members at current cost structure. At 30 members plus print sales we have headroom. Main worry was a slow stretch between gallery shows, but even at 24 members we stay safe.
ActionItems: Wait for building manager to confirm the lease-renewal figure
Revisit after year-end with Nina for proper modeling
